title: Nexus PatchWorldKbRelationshipRequest
description: Request body for POST /v1/local/worlds/{world_id}/kb/patch-relationship (V1.74). Action-discriminated add/update/remove for typed World KB relationships with per-row OCC on kb_relationships.revision.

relationship_id.description: Storage row id; required for update and remove, omitted for add.

action.description: Discriminator: add creates a new row; update mutates an existing row; remove deletes it.

expected_version.description: Per-row version observed by the client; required for update/remove, omitted or 0 for add.

relationship.description: Payload required for add and update; omitted for remove.
